executive.headline: Every busy professional deserves a calendar that finally listens.
executive.subhead: Help professionals turn scheduling friction into a clear booking and availability workflow. Built for decision-makers who need consultants, service businesses, and busy teams to move from uncertainty to a confident next action.

technical.headline: AI Nonprofit Governance Platform: a focused workflow, not a generic shell
technical.subhead: Help professionals turn scheduling friction into a clear booking and availability workflow. Typed product engine, working API routes, and a smoke-tested first workflow for consultants, service businesses, and busy teams.

end-user.headline: Every busy professional deserves a calendar that finally listens.
end-user.subhead: Help professionals turn scheduling friction into a clear booking and availability workflow. Built for consultants, service businesses, and busy teams, with a useful first result before the app asks for commitment.
